summary: Frontend-only E2E testing of Aira Motion Lab (R3F + Rapier physics sim). All 11 feature scenarios from the request were exercised via Playwright using data-testid selectors and telemetry text content. All flows passed including 3D scene render, camera modes, pause, goal selector (6 goals), object spawner (all 6 types), clear scene, walk-to-target with success increment, jump-over-obstacle (JUMPING state observed), follow-the-light (position drifted toward light), motor sliders, save/reload persistence via localStorage, and wipe.

issues: Label and value are sibling spans without a separator, producing concatenated text like 'Pos XYZ0.00 0.48 0.00' when read via textContent. Visually fine, but a small gap/colon would help readability and screen readers.

critical_code_review_comments: simStore.persist(): swallows errors silently with empty catch {} — log a warning so quota/security errors surface during dev.

Simulation.jsx seed effect uses a ref guard but the persisted state already restores objects; the guard is OK but if user reloads with 0 saved objects the seed runs and increments nextId via spawnObject — acceptable but worth documenting.
RightSidebar Wipe button uses window.confirm() which is fine for now but inconsistent with the shadcn dialog style used elsewhere.
WebGL produces a one-time 'GPU stall due to ReadPixels' warning in headless mode — informational only, no functional impact.
tel-* rows render label and value as adjacent spans without whitespace, leading to glued textContent. Minor a11y/scraping issue.
seed_data_creation: App auto-seeds 2 objects (target at 4,0,0 and light at -3,1.2,3) on first load when localStorage is empty — verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is fully client-side. Use https://aira-motion-lab.preview.emergentagent.com. Always `localStorage.clear()` before tests that need fresh state. Goal dropdown is a shadcn Select — open with click on [data-testid='goal-select'] then click [role='option']:has-text('<Label>') with force=True. Telemetry textContent concatenates label+value, so use 'startsWith' or 'contains' assertions. Wipe button shows window.confirm — register a dialog handler before clicking. Walk-to-Target test results: Aira reached spawn target within ~4s and Success counter incremented to 1. Jump-Over-Obstacle showed JUMPING state within ~5s. Follow-the-Light moved Aira toward light position.
rca of the issue: No issues to RCA — all flows passed.
